MiraOrb.description: A living, breathing AI entity. NOT a button. NOT a black void.
requirements: REMOVE the black fill/void completely. The center must be LIGHT.
Use layered <div>s with Framer Motion for the glow effect.
Layer 2 (Body): The main orb shape. Gradient from Magenta to Pink. Rotating slowly.
Layer 3 (Highlight): A top-left specular highlight to give it volume (Glassy look).
Layer 4 (Icon): A white, soft-blurred Paw Print icon in the center. Opacity ~0.8.
Position: Fixed bottom-right (bottom-6 right-6) with high z-index.
Interaction: On hover, scale up slightly and brighten. On click, ripple effect.

technical_implementation.wrapper: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 cursor-pointer group
technical_implementation.core_orb: relative w-24 h-24 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-fuchsia-400 to-purple-600 blur-sm mix-blend-screen
technical_implementation.paw_icon: absolute inset-0 m-auto w-10 h-10 text-white/90 drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.8)]

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use the old SVG path with the black fill.
Implement the 'Layered Light' approach described in component_instructions.
Ensure the component is positioned fixed at the bottom-right of the screen.
Use Framer Motion for the continuous breathing animation.
Add the 'paw print' SVG icon as an inline SVG within the component.
Ensure the orb looks 'alive' and 'ethereal' against dark backgrounds.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic gradients, centered layouts).
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
